title: GMS Week 17 - STARVED OF SUPPLY!
summary:
Main
India finally leads the way on pricing this week, as all of markets i.e. Pakistani, Bangladeshi and even the Turkish markets work their way towards Eid holidays and the end of the Holy month of Ramadan. In fact, several markets are likely to be closed anywhere from a couple of days (as in the sub-continent) with the Turkish market celebrating until Thursday.
